valid: For the period 12:00 (UTC) on Sun 19 Apr 2026 to 12:00 (UTC) on Mon 20 Apr 2026
general_synopsis: High Ireland 1028 expected north Iceland 1034 by 0600 tomorrow

Viking.text:
Wind
In southwest, northwesterly 3 to 5, veering southeasterly 4 to 6. In northeast, variable 2 to 4, becoming southeasterly 3 to 5 for a time.
Sea state
In southwest, moderate, occasionally slight. in northeast, moderate.
Weather
In southwest, rain. In northeast, rain, fog patches.
Visibility
In southwest, moderate or good. In northeast, moderate or good, occasionally very poor.
